text: 4. Transcript is re-read fresh each time: `transcript::read_recent(path, 14, 2500)` (`transcript.rs:84-139`, tails last 96KB, last 14 user/assistant messages, capped 2500 chars) — `runtime.rs:352-358`. [...] 5. Distill spawned as a background `tokio::spawn` with a 20s timeout (`runtime.rs:365-375`) calling `distill::distill_session(transcript, current_title, session_id)`. [...] 6. `distill_session()` (`src/distill.rs:333-422`): resolution order is `$TENEX_EDGE_DISTILL_CMD` override → `edge-distillation` role from `llms.json`/`providers.json` via `llmconfig::resolve_role` (`distill.rs:373`), dispatched to `claude-cli` binary (`complete_via_claude_cli`, `distill.rs:239-297`) or native `rig` (`openrouter`/`ollama`, `complete_via_rig`, `distill.rs:168-233`) → nudge-to-keep fallback (keep current title, blank activity, `distill.rs:409-421`). One model call yields both `TITLE:` (stable objective, nudged-to-keep) and `NOW:` (regenerated every call) via `SESSION_SYSTEM_PROMPT` (`distill.rs:113`), parsed by `parse_labels` (`distill.rs:144-163`). [...] 7. On completion (`runtime.rs:295-320`): result written to `sessions.title/activity` via `set_session_distill`, then **unconditionally** `enqueue_status()` republishes — no diff against the previous title/activity before publishing.
